calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-29-2024 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-19-2023 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Feb-27-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Dec-06-2022 Continued To Nov-06-23 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT And Memorandum Of Points And Authorities (Motions)
Off Calendar Aug-19-2022 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT VICTAULIC COMPANY MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT

Defendant Victaulic Company's motion for summary judgment is denied.

(SEE WORD MINUTES FOR COMPLETE DETAILS)

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling order in compliance with CRC3.1312.

Judge: Vedica Puri: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/VP)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-19-2022 Set For Trial On Feb-14-23 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Intervene
Off Calendar Nov-22-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PROPOSED INTERVENOR ACCO ENGINEERED SYSTEMS's Motion To Intervene

No appearances are made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Motion granted pursuant to plaintiff's notice of non-opposition filed November 8, 2021. Counsel for plaintiff-in-intervention is admonished that Code of Civil Procedure section 1005(b) requires that motions be filed and served at least 16 court days before the hearing.

Order signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/EPS)
